title: nerium undulatum
intro: Nerium undulatum, also known as California lilac or mountain lilac, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Baja California. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Nerium undulatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues and wounds.
